holdings.infoBox: IMVP is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Polycab India stock at 4.39%, Oberoi Realty at 3.70%, NMDC Ltd at 3.64%, Hindalco Industries at 3.60%, and Bajaj Auto at 3.56%.

overview.description: The Invesco India ETF (IMVP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg India MVP index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of large- and mid-cap Indian companies that exhibit strong momentum, value, volatility, and profitability. IMVP was launched on Mar 5, 2008 and is issued by Invesco.
